title: Notify me when this item becomes available
notes: Feature request for notifications when out-of-stock items become available; saved search notifications sent daily

notes: Display showing count of bids on auction listings; clickable to view bid history

notes: Notification status when seller accepts buyer's Best Offer; item remains active until payment

notes: Status notification when seller declines buyer's Best Offer; cannot be deleted from bids/offers tab

title: Making an offer
notes: Notification when a Best Offer reaches expiration time without acceptance; offers typically expire in 48 hours

notes: Record of all offers sent and received for a listing; viewable by sellers in Seller Hub

title: Making an offer
notes: Confirmation status displayed when buyer submits Best Offer to seller

notes: Seller view showing all incoming Best Offers from buyers; managed through Seller Hub

title: Making an offer
notes: Buyer view tracking all outgoing Best Offers; accessible through My eBay bids and offers section

notes: Seller tool allowing discount offers to buyers who watch or add items to cart; requires minimum 5% discount

title: Sending offers to buyers
notes: Multi-market variant of Offers to Watchers; available across eBay marketplaces globally

notes: Opt-in advertising program promoting listings on external platforms; cost-per-click model

notes: Downloadable CSV reports of seller transactions and order details from Seller Hub

notes: Email and in-app notifications for order status changes including shipped, in transit, and delivered

title: Tracking your delivery
notes: Shipping status notification indicating package is with carrier for final delivery

notes: Inventory management tool for monitoring stock across multiple locations; available via API and MIP

title: Bidding basics
notes: Email notification sent to buyers when their auction bid has been surpassed by another bidder

title: Bidding basics
notes: In-app and web notification showing buyer has been outbid on auction item

notes: Installment payment option through PayPal and Klarna; splits purchase into four interest-free payments

title: Resolving payment issues
notes: Order status notification when payment processing encounters error or is declined

title: Resolving payment issues
notes: Temporary status displayed while payment authorization is being verified

title: Paying for eBay purchases
notes: Active status showing payment is being processed through eBay's payment system

title: Getting paid for items you've sold
notes: Confirmation notification to seller that buyer's payment has been successfully processed

title: Contact eBay
notes: Customer service channel for resolving issues via telephone; availability varies by account type

notes: AI-powered image cleanup tool removing backgrounds from product photos; available in mobile app for iOS and Android

notes: Interactive image viewer allowing buyers to magnify product photos for detailed inspection

title: Seller ratings
notes: Percentage metric showing proportion of positive feedback received; displayed beneath username on listings

notes: Email notification sent when watched items decrease in price or matching items appear

notes: Notification alerting buyers when watched item prices are reduced by seller

notes: Plural variant of Price Drop Alert; system-wide notification feature for price reductions

title: Searching for items on eBay
notes: Search filter allowing buyers to set minimum and maximum price boundaries for results

notes: AI-powered pricing recommendations based on market data and sold comparables; shown during listing creation

notes: Legacy feature for physical coupon codes; largely replaced by digital coded coupons

notes: Seller-initiated discount offers sent directly to specific buyers; not publicly visible

notes: Invitation-only premium support program offering dedicated account managers and listing optimization

notes: UK and EU program designation for high-volume professional sellers with business seller status

notes: Policy documentation listing items banned or regulated on eBay marketplaces by geographic region

notes: Brand-level advertising campaign promoting all items from specific manufacturer or trademark

notes: Advertising extension promoting domestic listings to buyers in international markets

notes: Growth-focused variant of Pro Seller Program emphasizing business expansion and category optimization
